title: Individual psychotherapy
description: One-on-one therapy for anxiety, depression, grief, trauma, and life transitions.

title: Adolescent therapy
description: Support for teens navigating emotional distress, relationships, identity, and school stress.

title: Psychological assessments and case formulation
description: Structured clinical assessments and formulations to understand and address concerns clearly.

title: Workshops and psychoeducational webinars
description: Group learning sessions on mental health topics for organizations, schools, and communities.

title: Trauma-informed and neurodivergence-affirming care
description: Inclusive care that recognizes trauma, neurodiversity, and diverse lived experiences.

title: Supervision and reflective learning spaces
description: Reflective supervision for mental health professionals and trainees.

title: Online and in-person sessions
description: Flexible therapy sessions through secure online or in-clinic formats.
